hooks.command: status=$(jq -r '.tool_input.status // empty'); if [ "$status" = "completed" ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"TaskUpdate set status=completed. Per the Update Protocol, update knowledge_base/sprint_plan.md (tracker) and the relevant knowledge_base/*.md file (decisions or lessons) before moving on."}}'; fi
